title: 1005-00009 NL Week 0
treatment_protocol_ch1: For each patient, one 4-mm skin punch biopsy was collected from lesion located on the trunk or extremities with approximately 0.5 mm or more of induration and approximately 5 mm from the edge of the plaque, and another from macroscopically normal non-lesion on a similar body area to the biopsy plaque (i.e. arm, arm or leg, leg).  Biopsies were kept frozen –80oC until RNA preparation.
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was isolated with Qiagen's RNeasy mini kit according to the manufacturer’s instructions.
label_protocol_ch1: Biotinylated cRNA were prepared according to the standard Affymetrix protocol from 6 microg total RNA (Expression Analysis Technical Manual, 2001, Affymetrix).
hyb_protocol: Following fragmentation, 11 microg of cDNA were hybridized for 16 hr at 45oC on GeneChip HG U133 Plus 2.0 Array. GeneChips were washed and stained in the Affymetrix Fluidics Station 450.
scan_protocol: GeneChips were scanned using the GeneChip Scanner 3000.
data_processing: The data was normalized by GCRMA.
